holdings.infoBox: VOE is an equity ETF with a total of 181 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 1.59%, Cummins at 1.58%, SLB N.V. at 1.44%, General Motors Company at 1.33%, and Marathon Petroleum at 1.30%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Mid-Cap Value ETF (VOE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Mid Value index. The fund tracks an index of mid-cap stocks in the US. Holdings are selected and weighed based on five value factors. VOE was launched on Aug 17, 2006 and is issued by Vanguard.
